_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Team dynamics and collaboration involves changing organisational structures to fixable and sustainable designs; leading on strategy for an entire organisation, joining up business needs with innovative analysis; making and justify decisions characterised by high levels of risk, impact and complexity; effectively build consensus between organisations (private or public) or highly independent and diverse stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-A-002 (RM, cosine: 0.508), LS-A-002 (LS, cosine: 0.494).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.606). Shared vocabulary: [build, structures]. DDaT-only terms [analysis, business, changing, characterised, collaboration, complexity] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, cross, establishing, functional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.829, R=0.875). R exceeds P by 0.046 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 54 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (99.3%). The model interprets "Team dynamics and collaboration involves changing organisational structures to f" as logically implying aspects of "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 < STS 0.606 (gap -0.088). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, business, changing] and [accountability, across, boundaries] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [build, structures]. DDaT-only: [analysis, business, changing, characterised, collaboration, complexity]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, across, boundaries, cross, establishing, functional].
